simplification_item: S4TWL - Material Number Field Length Extension
title: Material number extended to 40 characters
description: Code assuming MATNR is CHAR18 (offset/length, fixed-length MOVE, hardcoded 18) truncates or mismatches at 40 chars

title: Stock quantity fields aggregated into MATDOC
description: Stock quantities no longer persisted in MARD/MARC/MCHB; aggregated from MATDOC and exposed via NSDM compatibility views

title: Add ORDER BY where implicit row order is relied upon
description: On HANA a SELECT without ORDER BY is non-deterministic; code relying on implicit sort (READ BINARY SEARCH, first-row logic) can break

title: FI/CO totals and line-item access redirected to ACDOCA
description: Classic FI/CO totals tables replaced by the Universal Journal (ACDOCA) with compatibility views; direct GLT0/FAGLFLEXT/COEP access must change

title: Customer/vendor master via Business Partner (CVI)
description: Customer/vendor are BP roles; create/change via XD0x/XK0x/legacy FMs must route through BP; direct KNA1/LFA1 reads usually still work but writes must not
